englishDefinitions: A famous German airship that caught fire and crashed in 1937 in New Jersey, USA.
Sometimes used as a cultural reference to a huge public disaster or failure.
persianTranslation: کشتی هوایی معروف آلمانی که در سال ۱۹۳۷ سقوط کرد
نمادی از فاجعه یا شکست بزرگ
examples: The Hindenburg disaster was one of the most famous airship accidents in history.
The event went so badly that one reporter compared it to the Hindenburg.
Many documentaries about early aviation mention the Hindenburg.
